Username must be 3-16 characters!: O le igoa ole igoa e tatau ona 3-16 mataitusi!

● At least 1 Lowercase Letter: ● Le itiiti ifo ma le 1 Mataitusi Laiti
Password must be 8-16 characters!: O le upu faataga e tatau ona 8-16 mataitusi!
● Passwords must match: ● E tatau ona fetaui upu faataga

Not your preferred language?: E le o lau gagana e te mana'o iai?

● Password Length Must Be Between 8-16: ● O le umi ole upu e tatau ona i le va o le 8-16
